Title: Settings > Core > Tool-tips
Steps:
Step Description:
Open blade with general Settings > Pay attention to tooltips





Expected Result:
All tooltips are folded

Step Description:
1. Click on Blue question mark for field1
2. Click on Blue question mar for field2





Expected Result:
1. One tooltip for the field1 is unfolded
2. The tooltip for field2 is unfolded. The tooltip for the field1 is folded


Step Description:
Click on the Hide link

Expected Result:
All tooltips are folded
Steps (Expected Result):
1. All tooltips are folded

2. 1. One tooltip for the field1 is unfolded
2. The tooltip for field2 is unfolded. The tooltip for the field1 is folded


3. All tooltips are folded
Steps (Step):
1. Open blade with general Settings > Pay attention to tooltips





2. 1. Click on Blue question mark for field1
2. Click on Blue question mar for field2





3. Click on the Hide link
